title: Add business information section from Google Maps listing

requirements.text: Create a new section below the existing contact information and map that displays detailed business information from the Google Maps listing for Ghuge Medicals at https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5, including any available descriptions, business category, and location details presented in a visually organized card format

quotes: add info as a new section

acceptanceCriteria: A new section is added below the map section in App.tsx
The section displays business information extracted from the Google Maps listing
Information is presented in an organized, readable format consistent with the medical-themed design
The section uses the same OKLCH color system and styling as existing sections

requirements.text: Update the Google Maps iframe src attribute to use the exact coordinates from the Google Maps link https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5 to ensure the embedded map displays the precise location of Ghuge Medicals
acceptanceCriteria: The iframe src URL is updated with coordinates matching the Google Maps link location
The embedded map displays Ghuge Medicals at Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduwadi-413208 correctly
The map marker is positioned at the exact location from the shared link

constraints: Do not modify the existing sections for business hours, contact information, or address display
Maintain the professional medical-themed design with green and white color palette
Keep the new section consistent with the existing layout and styling patterns
Do not change any files in frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
